case_title: SHARON LYNN WARD VS. JEA-II, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WARD, SHARON LYNN AS TO DEFENDANT JEA-II, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA NITECAP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WARD, SHARON LYNN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JEA-II, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA NITECAP $2,454.22 PRINCIPAL, $5.95 INTEREST, $151.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,611.47, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
